M1.description: X-ray not taken within the past 12 months or near enough to the start of treatment.

M2.description: Not paid separately when the patient is an inpatient.

M15.description: Separately billed services/tests have been bundled as they are considered components of the same procedure.

N2.description: This allowance has been made in accordance with the most appropriate level of care.

N19.description: Procedure code incidental to primary procedure.

N20.description: Service not separately priced or included in the allowance for another service or procedure.

N115.description: This decision was based on a National Coverage Determination (NCD).

N386.description: This decision was based on a Local Coverage Determination (LCD).

N432.description: Alert: Adjustment based on the sequestration of funds as mandated by law.
